global.description: The ad features a combination of text and abstract shapes with a focus on savings.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings and flexible booking options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: WayPoint
elements.description: A bold, prominent text element at the top of the ad, featuring the word 'WayPoint' in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: A medium-sized text element in the center, conveying the message 'Last-minute savings' in a readable font.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: A smaller text element below the main body text, stating 'Flexible booking options' in a simple, clear font.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: A series of abstract shapes in the background, including circles and rectangles, creating a visually appealing backdrop.

elements.label: Claim reward
elements.description: A button-like text element at the bottom, encouraging users to 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color for visibility.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: Various additional shapes that add depth and interest to the background, including circles and rectangles.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned in the background, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the background, providing a base for the text elements.

elements.label: Small shape
elements.description: A small shape located towards the bottom of the ad, adding to the decorative elements.

elements.label: Another small shape
elements.description: Another small shape positioned near the bottom, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Savings message
elements.description: A larger text element at the bottom of the ad, emphasizing 'Last-minute savings' in a bold font.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Flexinl ons Claim reward

elements.label: WayPoint branding
elements.description: The word 'WayPoint' prominently displayed at the top, serving as the brand identifier.
